title: verbascum jankae
intro: Verbascum jankae, also known as Jankae's mullein, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the mullein family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve breathing, and even alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Additionally, the plant's extracts have been studied for their potential anti-cancer properties and their ability to protect against oxidative stress.
